description: David Garrett discusses how Devin Labs is tokenizing the $1 trillion global wine industry, addressing issues like authenticity, fraud, and customer acquisition through NFTs and digital assets.
topic_summary: In this keynote, David Garrett explains the tokenization of wine, highlighting the benefits of NFTs for authenticity and customer engagement. He introduces a champagne NFT linked to physical bottles, enabling airdrops and customer data acquisition [t=7:84-320:67].
